configurations.name: dev
runtimeArgs: nix shell nixpkgs#nodejs_22 -c npx next dev --port 3000

configurations.name: dev-maintenance
runtimeArgs: SITE_MODE=coming_soon nix shell nixpkgs#nodejs_22 -c npx next dev --port 3001

configurations.name: dev-maintenance-soldout
runtimeArgs: SITE_MODE=coming_soon PROTOTYPE_AVAILABLE=false nix shell nixpkgs#nodejs_22 -c npx next dev --port 3002
